metadata.title: Importer
metadata.description: Import data from Notion, Evernote, Apple Notes, Microsoft OneNote, Google Keep, Bear, Roam, and HTML files.

regex.target: .setName("将父页面保存在子文件夹中")
.setName("使用你的 Microsoft 帐户登录")
.setName("添加 YAML 创建/更新日期")

regex.source: .setDesc("Pick the files that you want to import.")
.setDesc("Choose a folder in the vault to put the imported files. Leave empty to output to vault root.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择一个文件夹来存放导入的文件。留空则输出到库根目录。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Import notes in the "Recently Deleted" folder. Unlike in Apple Notes, they will not be automatically removed after a set amount of time.')
regex.target: .setDesc('导入 "最近删除" 文件夹中的文件. 与Apple Notes不同，这些笔记不会在一段时间后自动删除.')

regex.source: .setDesc("Don't include the first line in the text, since Apple Notes uses it as the title. It will still be used as the note name.")
regex.target: .setDesc("不要包含第一行内容，因为苹果笔记会将其用作标题。这一行仍会被用作笔记名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When Apple Notes has detected handwriting in drawings, include it as text before the drawing.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当 Apple Notes 检测到绘图中的手写内容时，在绘图前包含该文本。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If imported, files archived in Google Keep will be tagged as archived.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果导入，存档在 Google Keep 中的文件将被打上存档标签。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If imported, files deleted in Google Keep will be tagged as deleted. Deleted notes will only exist in your Google export if deleted recently.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果导入，将在 Google Keep 中删除的文件标记为已删除。仅在最近删除的情况下，删除的笔记才会存在于您的 Google 导出中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Places the parent database pages in the same folder as the nested content.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将父数据库页面放置在与嵌套内容相同的文件夹中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Separate Notion blocks with only one line break (default is 2).")
regex.target: .setDesc("仅使用一个换行符分隔Notion块（默认为2个）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, attachments will be stored in the export folder in the OneNote Attachments folder.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用，附件将存储在导出文件夹中的 OneNote 附件文件夹中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Imports incompatible attachments which cannot be embedded in Obsidian, such as .exe files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("导入无法嵌入 Obsidian 的不兼容附件，例如 .exe 文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("You need to sign in to import your OneNote data.")
regex.target: .setDesc("你需要登录才能导入你的 OneNote 数据。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Signed in as ${o.displayName} (${o.mail}). If that's not the correct account, sign in again.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`已登录为 ${o.displayName} (${o.mail}). 如果这不是正确的账户, 请重新登录.`)

regex.source: .setDesc(`Last edited on: ${Ee.moment.utc(s.lastModifiedDateTime).format("Do MMMM YYYY")}. Contains ${(a=s.sections)==null?void 0:a.length} sections.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`最后编辑于: ${Ee.moment.utc(s.lastModifiedDateTime).format("Do MMMM YYYY")}. Contains ${(a=s.sections)==null?void 0:a.length} sections.`)

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, all attachments uploaded to Roam will be downloaded to your attachments folder.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，所有上传到 Roam 的附件都将下载到你的附件文件夹中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, notes will have the create-time and edit-time from Roam added as properties.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，笔记将添加来自 Roam 的创建时间和编辑时间作为属性。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, notes will have the full title added as a property (regardless of illegal file name characters).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，笔记将添加完整的标题作为属性（无论文件名中是否包含非法字符）。")

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:"Due to platform limitations, Apple Notes cannot be exported from this device. Open your vault on a Mac to export from Apple Notes."})
regex.target: .createEl("p",{text:"由于平台限制，无法从该设备导出 Apple Notes。请在 Mac 上打开你的库以从 Apple Notes 导出."})

regex.source: .createEl("div",{text:"An error occurred while trying to sign you in."})
.createEl("p",{text:"Due to platform limitations, only textpack and zip files can be imported from this device. Open your vault on a Mac to import textbundle files."})
regex.target: .createEl("p",{text:"由于平台限制，此设备仅能导入文本包和ZIP文件。请在Mac上打开您的库以导入文本捆绑文件."})
